meta.title: Konstech — Tech & AI for Local Businesses at Lake Constance
meta.description: Konstech helps businesses around Lake Constance work more efficiently with modern technology and AI.

hero.p: We help local businesses around Lake Constance get more out of their time with modern tech and AI — no buzzwords, no overhead.

services.title: What we do for you
services.subtitle: No theory — solutions that work from day one.

items.title: Process Automation
items.desc: Recurring tasks like invoices, emails, or data entry — we build systems that handle them for you.

items.title: Practical AI
items.desc: From intelligent text processing to automated responses — AI where it delivers real value.

items.title: Data Made Useful
items.desc: Turn your existing data into clear dashboards and decision aids — no more Excel chaos.

items.title: Digital Presence
items.desc: Fast, modern websites and online tools that convince customers and save you work.

items.title: Connect Systems
items.desc: Make your existing tools (accounting, CRM, calendar) talk to each other — automatically and error-free.

items.title: Security & GDPR
items.desc: Tech setup that meets German data protection requirements — without the headaches.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From first message to running solution — in three steps.

steps.title: Quick Message
steps.desc: Tell us in 2–3 sentences what's on your mind. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.desc: 15-minute call — we listen, ask questions, and give you concrete suggestions. No strings attached.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.desc: We build the solution, test it with you, and make sure everything runs smoothly. No tech jargon.

results.title: Typical Results
results.subtitle: What our clients report after working with us.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.name: Name
contact.message: What can we do for you?
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us briefly what's on your mind…
contact.note: Your data is only used for contacting you. No spam, no newsletter.
